description_long: This sculpture depicts a small, reclining human figure with curly dark hair and a light-colored garment. The figure appears to be lying on its side, with one arm bent and the other extended, and the head resting on the ground. The surface is painted in naturalistic tones, with the hair rendered in a textured, dark brown and the clothing in off-white with subtle shading. The facial features and hands are delicately modeled, giving the figure a lifelike appearance. The back of the sculpture is smooth and rounded, suggesting it is meant to be viewed primarily from the front and sides. The overall form is compact and solid, with no visible openings or interactive elements.
description: A small, reclining human figure sculpture with curly dark hair and a light-colored garment, rendered in naturalistic tones and lifelike detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, curly hair, and bent arm, with detailed modeling of the head and upper body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the figure's profile, extended arm, and the curvature of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back and the draped garment, with minimal detail on the face or limbs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the figure's head, hair texture, and the side of the garment, with the face partially visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
